{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Stellar Spear Remnants
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Stellar Spear Remnants]] appear thin, bony, and look like they are sketched in vivid starlight.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A spiked [[Stellar Spear]] [[Remnant]] rose.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
